Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Open the registration form.
2. Enter user details (name, email, password).
3. Click on the 'Register' button.
4. Verify that the user is registered successfully.
Expected Result: User should be registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the login form.
2. Enter valid user credentials (email, password).
3. Click on the 'Login' button.
4. Verify that the user is logged in successfully.
Expected Result: User should be logged in and redirected to the main dashboard.

Title: Profile Modification
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile settings.
2. Modify user details (name, email, password).
3. Click on the 'Save' button.
4. Verify that the profile has been updated successfully.
Expected Result: User profile should be updated with the new details.

Title: Emergency Visualization
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency visualization section.
2. Verify that the list of emergencies is displayed correctly.
3. Check if filtering options are available.
Expected Result: List of emergencies should be displayed, and filtering options should be functional.

Title: Zone Filtering
Test Steps:
1. Apply zone filter.
2. Verify that only relevant emergencies are displayed.
Expected Result: Only emergencies within the selected zone should be displayed.

Title: Task Visualization
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the task visualization section.
2. Verify that the list of tasks is displayed correctly.
3. Check if filtering options are available.
Expected Result: List of tasks should be displayed, and filtering options should be functional.

Title: Auto Assignment
Test Steps:
1. Set up auto assignment rules.
2. Assign a task automatically.
3. Verify that the task is assigned to a volunteer.
Expected Result: Task should be automatically assigned to a volunteer according to the defined rules.

Title: Coordinator Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the coordinator login form.
2. Enter valid coordinator credentials (email, password).
3. Click on the 'Login' button.
4. Verify that the coordinator is logged in successfully.
Expected Result: Coordinator should be logged in and redirected to the coordinator dashboard.

Title: Emergency Addition
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency addition section.
2. Fill in the emergency details.
3. Click on the 'Add' button.
4. Verify that the emergency is added successfully.
Expected Result: New emergency should be added to the system.

Title: Emergency Modification
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency modification section.
2. Modify emergency details.
3. Click on the 'Save' button.
4. Verify that the emergency details have been updated successfully.
Expected Result: Emergency details should be updated with the new information.

Title: Task Addition
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the task addition section.
2. Fill in the task details.
3. Click on the 'Add' button.
4. Verify that the task is added successfully.
Expected Result: New task should be added to the system.

Title: Task Modification
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the task modification section.
2. Modify task details.
3. Click on the 'Save' button.
4. Verify that the task details have been updated successfully.
Expected Result: Task details should be updated with the new information.

Title: Task Deletion
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the task deletion section.
2. Select a task to delete.
3. Confirm the deletion.
4. Verify that the task is deleted from the system.
Expected Result: Selected task should be deleted from the system.

Title: Emergency Deletion
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emergency deletion section.
2. Select an emergency to delete.
3. Confirm the deletion.
4. Verify that the emergency is deleted from the system.
Expected Result: Selected emergency should be deleted from the system.

Title: Volunteer Assignment
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the volunteer assignment section.
2. Select a task and a volunteer.
3. Assign the task to the volunteer.
4. Verify that the task is assigned to the volunteer.
Expected Result: Task should be assigned to the selected volunteer.

Title: Volunteer Removal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the volunteer removal section.
2. Select a task and a volunteer.
3. Remove the volunteer from the task.
4. Verify that the volunteer is removed from the task.
Expected Result: Volunteer should be removed from the selected task.

Title: Volunteer Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the volunteer login form.
2. Enter valid volunteer credentials (email, password).
3. Click on the 'Login' button.
4. Verify that the volunteer is logged in successfully.
Expected Result: Volunteer should be logged in and redirected to the volunteer dashboard.

Title: Notification Reception
Test Steps:
1. Receive a notification of task assignment.
2. Verify that the notification is received.
3. Accept the task assignment.
4. Verify that the task is assigned to the volunteer.
Expected Result: Volunteer should receive and accept the task assignment notification.

Title: Notification Reception (Removal)
Test Steps:
1. Receive a notification of task removal.
2. Verify that the notification is received.
3. Accept the task removal.
4. Verify that the volunteer is removed from the task.
Expected Result: Volunteer should receive and accept the task removal notification.

Title: Task View
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the task view section.
2. Verify that the task details are displayed correctly.
3. Check if the task status can be updated.
Expected Result: Task details should be displayed, and the task status should be updateable.

Title: Task Acceptance
Test Steps:
1. Accept a task.
2. Verify that the task status is updated to 'accepted'.
Expected Result: Task status should be updated to 'accepted'.

Title: Task View (Coordinator)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the task view section.
2. Verify that the task details are displayed correctly.
3. Check if the task status can be updated.
Expected Result: Task details should be displayed, and the task status should be updateable.

Title: Task Acceptance (Coordinator)
Test Steps:
1. Accept a task.
2. Verify that the task status is updated to 'accepted'.
Expected Result: Task status should be updated to 'accepted'.

Title: Logout
Test Steps:
1. Click on the logout button.
2. Verify that the user is logged out.
Expected Result: User should be logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Coordinator Logout
Test Steps:
1. Click on the logout button.
2. Verify that the coordinator is logged out.
Expected Result: Coordinator should be logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Volunteer Logout
Test Steps:
1. Click on the logout button.
2. Verify that the volunteer is logged out.
Expected Result: Volunteer should be logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Database Connection
Test Steps:
1. Establish a connection to the database.
2. Verify that the connection is successful.
Expected Result: Database connection should be established successfully.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device with internet connection.
Test Data: Name, Surname, Date of Birth, Email, Password, Phone Number
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the registration button.
3. Enter name, surname, date of birth, email, password, and phone number.
4. Confirm the correctness of the entered data.
5. Click on the confirm button.
Expected Result: A confirmation message appears indicating successful registration, and user data is saved in the database.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device with internet connection, user registered.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the login button.
3. Enter email and password.
4. Confirm the correctness of the entered data.
5. Click on the confirm button.
Expected Result: User is authenticated and redirected to the main application screen.

Title: Profile Modification
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device with internet connection, user logged in.
Test Data: New Name, New Surname, New Date of Birth, New Email, New Password, New Phone Number
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the profile modification button.
3. Modify the fields of personal and contact information.
4. Confirm the changes.
5. Click on the confirm button.
Expected Result: Database is updated with new information, and the updated information is displayed immediately on the screen.

Title: Coordinator Login
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device with internet connection, coordinator has valid code and password.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Click on the coordinator login button.
3. Enter the code and password provided by the administrator.
4. Confirm the correctness of the entered data.
5. Click on the confirm button.
Expected Result: Coordinator is authenticated and gains access to the application's functionalities. If the credentials are incorrect, the login attempt fails, and the coordinator is prompted to retry. <|EOF|>

Title: Add Emergency
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly.
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to add an emergency.
2. Fill in the required fields for the emergency type, country (with region and province), and severity.
3. Confirm the data entry.
Expected Result: The emergency is correctly inserted into the database with all relevant information.

Title: Modify Emergency
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly. The emergency to be modified was created by the same coordinator who wants to modify it.
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to modify an emergency.
2. Update the required fields for the emergency type, country (with region and province), and severity.
3. Confirm the modification.
Expected Result: The emergency is correctly updated in the database with all relevant information.

Title: Add Task
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly. The emergency in which the task will be added was created by the same coordinator who wants to add it.
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to add a task within the emergency page.
2. Fill in the required fields for the task title, area, number of volunteers needed, and detailed information on how to perform the task.
3. Confirm the data entry.
Expected Result: The task is correctly inserted into the database with all relevant information.

Title: Modify Task
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly. The task to be modified was created by the same coordinator who wants to modify it.
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to modify a task.
2. Update the required fields for the task title, area, number of volunteers needed, and detailed information on how to perform the task.
3. Confirm the modification.
Expected Result: The task is correctly updated in the database with the new information.

Title: Cancel Task
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly. The task to be canceled was created by the same coordinator who wants to cancel it.
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to cancel a task.
2. Confirm the cancellation.
Expected Result: The task is correctly removed from the database.

Title: Cancel Emergency
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly. The emergency to be canceled was created by the same coordinator who wants to cancel it.
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to cancel an emergency.
2. Confirm the cancellation.
Expected Result: The emergency is correctly removed from the database along with all related tasks.

Title: Assign Volunteer
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly. The volunteer to be assigned is under the command of the same coordinator who wants to assign them.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button to assign a volunteer to a task.
Expected Result: The volunteer receives a notification on the app and can accept it.

Title: Remove Volunteer
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Coordinator login has been performed correctly. The volunteer to be removed is under the command of the same coordinator who wants to remove them.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button to remove a volunteer from a task.
Expected Result: The volunteer is removed from the task list in the database.

Title: Volunteer Login
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. The volunteer has a registered account.
Test Steps: 1. Enter the code and password provided by the administrator.
Expected Result: The volunteer is correctly authenticated and redirected to the main application screen.

Title: Receive Assignment Notification
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Volunteer login has been performed correctly. The volunteer has not been previously assigned to a task.
Test Steps: 1. A coordinator assigns the volunteer to a task.
Expected Result: The volunteer receives a notification about the assignment.

Title: View Task
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Volunteer login has been performed correctly. The volunteer has been previously assigned to a task.
Test Steps: 1. Click the button to view the task.
Expected Result: The volunteer can view the details of the task they are currently assigned to.

Title: Accept Assignment
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Volunteer login has been performed correctly. The volunteer has received a notification of assignment.
Test Steps: 1. Click the notification to accept the assignment.
Expected Result: The volunteer is correctly added to the task list.

Title: Receive Removal Notification
Preconditions: The application has been downloaded and installed on an Android device with internet connection. Volunteer login has been performed correctly. The volunteer has been previously assigned to a task.
Test Steps: 1. A coordinator removes the volunteer from a task.
Expected Result: The volunteer receives a notification about their removal from the task. The volunteer's data in the database is updated accordingly. <|end|>
